---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit code changes to NIMBU OS
title: "[TYPE] Brief description"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Brief description of your changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (fixes #issue_number)
- [ ] New feature (relates to #issue_number)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Build system change

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue_number) or Relates to #(issue_number)

## Changes Made
List the main changes:
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
Describe how you tested your changes:
- [ ] Tested on QEMU
- [ ] Tested shell commands
- [ ] Verified memory usage
- [ ] Checked for regressions
- [ ] Tested edge cases

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guide
- [ ] I've commented complex logic
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if needed)
- [ ] API_REFERENCE.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] No new compiler warnings
- [ ] Changes build successfully
- [ ] Tested on QEMU
- [ ] No memory leaks
- [ ] Commit messages are clear

## Documentation Changes
- [ ] DOCUMENTATION.md updated
- [ ] API_REFERENCE.md updated
- [ ] SOURCE_CODE_GUIDE.md updated
- [ ] Inline code comments added
- [ ] No changes needed

## Screenshots/Logs (if applicable)
Console output, error messages, or relevant information.

## Additional Notes
Any other information that would be helpful for reviewers.

---

Thank you for contributing to NIMBU OS! 🚀
